title: In Parliament | Abena Oppong-Asare MP
headings: h3: Abena welcomes stronger renters’ rights from today for over 12,500 people in Erith and Thamesmead
h3: Share Your Views: Help Shape Thamesmead Birchmere Park’s Pride in Place Funding
h3: 500 New Free Breakfast Clubs rolled out including in Erith and Thamesmead

h3: On the anniversary of Valerie Forde’s death, we must deliver the change Black women need

h3: Here for Erith and Thamesmead
text_excerpt: In Parliament | Abena Oppong-Asare MP Facebook Twitter Mail Instagram Youtube Home About Abena Latest news Monthly Newsletters In Parliament Maiden Speech Thamesmead’s Pride in Place Survey Campaign Summer School 2026 In the community Southeastern Campaign Cost of Living Help Next Stop Thamesmead Events Sign up to a ‘Meet your MP’ Coffee Morning with Abena Annual Christmas Card Competition Get in touch Search In Parliament Your voice in Parliament In my maiden speech, which you can watch here , I spoke about my pride in representing our beautiful and diverse community of Erith and Thamesmead in Parliament and highlighted its rich history and exciting future. I also outlined some of the priorities, as communicated to me through conversations with those across the constituency, that I seek to deliver for our area. These priorities include: Bringing the DLR to Thamesmead and improving local transport links Improving local housing and ending homelessness Tackling the threat of climate change and protecting our environment Addressing concerns about crime and anti-social behaviour Fighting to improve our schools and invest in education I’ll be using every opportunity I can to raise these and other issues in Parliament, which I know matter so much to you. You can see my speeches, interventions, and questions in Parliament below and also by using this link here .
